content:
## Page Section / Title  
(No explicit section title visible on the page)  


## All Verbatim Text  
- **Top-right corner**:  
  SAN FRANCISCO:  
  Name of Street 1234 Ap.106  
  +11 1234.5678  

  LOS ANGELES:  
  Name of Street 1234 Ap.106  
  +11 1234.5678  

  LOS ANGELES:  
  Name of Street 1234 Ap.106  
  +11 1234.5678  

- **Bottom-right corner**:  
  ai  
  sa  
  lon  
  EMPOWERING AI  
  CONNECTIONS  

- **Bottom-center**:  
  keep connected_  


## Visual Elements  
### Logos  
- **Primary logo (bottom-right)**:  
  - Text-based logo with the brand name "ai sa lon" (stacked vertically: "ai" at top, "sa" in middle, "lon" at bottom).  
  - Tagline "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS" in smaller, uppercase sans-serif font below the brand name.  
  - No explicit shape, but uses a clean, modern sans-serif typeface.  

- **Secondary logo (top-right)**:  
  - Square icon with rounded corners (pink background).  
  - Contains a stylized meerkat face (matching the main illustration’s geometric style).  
  - No clear space or minimum size specified, but appears as a small, distinct icon.  

### Color Palette  
- **Background**: Bright cyan (#00E6FF or similar vibrant cyan).  
- **Secondary logo background**: Pink (#FF3366 or similar bright pink).  
- **Meerkat illustration**: Multicolored geometric shapes (includes red, orange, yellow, purple, black, white, and beige tones).  
- **Text**: Black (for all body copy, headings, and tagline).  
- **Geometric lines**: White (thin, outline-style lines forming polygonal shapes).  

### Typography  
- **Brand name ("ai sa lon")**:  
  - Typeface: Modern sans-serif (likely a geometric or humanist sans-serif, e.g., Futura, Avenir, or similar).  
  - Weight: Bold (heavy).  
  - Sample text: "ai" (top), "sa" (middle), "lon" (bottom) stacked vertically.  

- **Tagline ("EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS")**:  
  - Typeface: Same sans-serif as brand name, but lighter weight (regular or medium).  
  - Sample text: "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS" (uppercase, smaller size than brand name).  

- **Contact information**:  
  - Typeface: Sans-serif (likely the same as brand name, but regular weight).  
  - Sample text: "SAN FRANCISCO:", "Name of Street 1234 Ap.106", "+11 1234.5678" (uppercase for city names, regular case for addresses/phone numbers).  

- **Call-to-action ("keep connected_")**:  
  - Typeface: Sans-serif (matches brand name, regular weight).  
  - Sample text: "keep connected_" (lowercase, with an underscore at the end).  

### Imagery / Photography  
- **Main illustration**: Stylized, low-poly (geometric) meerkat.  
  - Subject: Meerkat (anthropomorphic, standing upright).  
  - Style: Vector-based, polygonal shapes with bold, contrasting colors (red, orange, yellow, purple, black, white, beige).  
  - Mood: Playful, modern, tech-forward (aligns with "AI" theme).  
  - Treatment: No photographic realism—abstract, geometric, and vibrant.  

### Iconography  
- **Secondary logo icon**: Stylized meerkat face (geometric, low-poly style matching the main illustration).  
- **Call-to-action icon**: Small white triangle (pointing left) preceding "keep connected_".  

### Layout Grid  
- **Column structure**: Two-column layout (left column for main illustration, right column for contact info and logos).  
- **Margins**: Generous white space around all elements (especially the meerkat and geometric lines).  
- **Spacing**: Even spacing between contact info entries (San Francisco, Los Angeles, Los Angeles) and between the brand name/tagline.  

### Geometric / Decorative Elements  
- **Background lines**: Thin, white, outline-style polygons (triangles, quadrilaterals) forming a loose, interconnected pattern.  
- **Meerkat illustration**: Composed of geometric shapes (triangles, trapezoids) with sharp edges and flat color fills.  


## Page Layout Summary  
- **Left side**: Dominated by the large, low-poly meerkat illustration, with white geometric lines extending from it into the background.  
- **Right side**: Top-right corner has the secondary logo (pink square with meerkat); middle-right has stacked contact information (San Francisco, Los Angeles, Los Angeles); bottom-right has the primary logo (brand name + tagline).  
- **Bottom-center**: Call-to-action text "keep connected_" with a small white triangle icon.  
- **Overall**: Balanced, clean layout with ample white space. The meerkat and geometric lines create visual interest on the left, while the right side is organized with contact info and branding.  


## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page  
- **No explicit do/don't rules** are printed on the page.  
- **Implicit guidance**:  
  - Consistent use of the low-poly meerkat style for illustrations/icons.  
  - Uniform sans-serif typeface for all text (brand name, tagline, contact info, call-to-action).  
  - Vibrant cyan background with white geometric accents.  
  - Clear separation of branding (logos, tagline) from contact information.
